description: User manually groups and commits dotfile changes across multiple sessions instead of having automated sync
User manually requests commit-and-push at the end of nearly every coding session
User asks how to build/run projects repeatedly because there is no standardized run command or script
User manually runs drift analysis sessions to find Mint system changes not captured in NixOS config
Android emulator MCP tooling is manually copied between repos instead of being a shared reusable package
User lacks automated monitoring for when better or faster transcription models become available for whisper-writer
